vocab.meaning: sự tự chủ khi cầm lái
vocab.example: I relish the autonomy behind the wheel, as it allows me to dictate the pace and route of the journey.
Being a passenger transforms me into a leisurely spectator, free to soak in the passing landscapes.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác phấn khích gián tiếp
vocab.example: I sometimes enjoy the vicarious thrill of being a passenger while a skilled driver navigates winding mountain roads.
I prefer being a passenger after a long workday to minimize my cognitive load and simply unwind.

vocab.meaning: người ngồi sau hay chỉ đạo tài xế (thường gây khó chịu)
vocab.example: I try my best not to be a backseat driver, even though I often feel the urge to suggest a faster route.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác làm chủ đầy phấn khích
vocab.example: There is an exhilarating sense of agency in controlling a powerful machine on an open highway.

vocab.meaning: sự suy ngẫm không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: The passenger seat offers a rare pocket of time for uninterrupted contemplation or catching up on a good book.
My preference for driving stems from my susceptibility to motion sickness whenever I’m not the one in control.
I take pride in being a proactive navigator, assisting the driver by keeping a close eye on the GPS.

vocab.meaning: sự thoải mái khi ngồi yên
vocab.example: Modern luxury cars provide such sedentary comfort that I often find myself dozing off as a passenger.
